context: Personal rules for tracking which Calvin-paid expenses can be reimbursed by the Chicago Bar Association (CLE committee), Loyola Law alumni programs, the Cook County PD office (work mileage), or his FSA/HSA. Not employer-imposed — this is Calvin's own bookkeeping standard.

validation_rules.requirement: CTA + lunch on a committee-meeting day
validation_rules.notes: Submit within 14 days of meeting per CBA committee rules

validation_rules.requirement: Mileage to and from Loyola Law for guest lectures or mentor sessions
validation_rules.notes: Alumni office reimburses at IRS standard mileage rate

validation_rules.requirement: Lyft to Cook County Jail for client meetings
validation_rules.action: Submit for reimbursement via office mileage form
validation_rules.notes: Submit weekly. CTA preferred; Lyft only when court schedule forces it.
Track for CLE pro-bono credit toward annual reporting

validation_rules.requirement: Lunch between morning court and afternoon hearings
validation_rules.notes: Track for monthly budget purposes only

validation_rules.requirement: Copays at Wicker Park Health Associates, Northside Athletic Medicine, prescriptions

validation_rules.action: HSA-eligible only with doctor's letter of medical necessity
validation_rules.notes: Dr. Okonkwo has issued letter on file

validation_rules.action: Personal — schedule A deduction if itemizing
validation_rules.notes: Cook County PD office does NOT reimburse private bar dues
Per CBA committee policy; one IPA flagged separately

validation_rules.requirement: Receipt older than 30 days for CBA reimbursement
validation_rules.notes: Ellen Hargrove has been generous on this; do not abuse

validation_rules.requirement: NOLA trip with Naomi, Christmas in Indianapolis
Garmin Forerunner 265, Nov 7 dinner at Avec
Same receipt scanned twice into QB
validation_rules.notes: Only one valid receipt per expense

validation_rules.requirement: Receipt where total is illegible or torn
validation_rules.notes: Bank statement alone is not sufficient documentation

validation_rules.requirement: Cash gratuity at Big Star, Cozy Corner
validation_rules.notes: Not reimbursable; included in personal dining budget
